name: Vienna Game
description: An opening where White develops with Nc3 and keeps options for f4 and kingside play.

name: Bishop's Opening
description: A direct opening where White develops the bishop early to c4 and aims for rapid piece activity.

name: Ponziani Opening
description: An old but tricky opening where White supports d4 with c3 and aims for rapid central play.

name: Evans Gambit
description: A sharp gambit in the Italian where White sacrifices the b-pawn for initiative.
movesPreview: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. b4

name: Danish Gambit
description: A very aggressive opening where White gambits pawns for fast development and open lines.

name: Scotch Gambit
description: A sharp Scotch-related system where White prioritizes fast piece development and initiative.
movesPreview: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. d4 exd4 4. Bc4

name: Dutch Defense
description: A defense based on ...f5, aiming for active kingside and central control.

name: Dutch Defense Leningrad Variation
description: A Dutch setup with kingside fianchetto and active counterplay against White's center.
movesPreview: 1. d4 f5 2. g3 Nf6 3. Bg2 g6

name: Dutch Defense Stonewall Variation
description: A Dutch formation with pawns on f5, e6, d5 and c6, aiming for a firm central grip.
movesPreview: 1. d4 f5 2. Nf3 Nf6 3. e3 e6 4. Bd3 d5

name: Benoni Defense
description: A sharp and asymmetrical defense where Black fights for counterplay against White's center.

name: Benko Gambit
description: A queenside gambit where Black sacrifices a pawn for long-term pressure and open lines.

name: Alekhine Defense
description: A provocative defense where Black invites White to overextend the center.
